    Struct SceneBuilderSchema2Settings

    Defines configurable options for converting SceneBuilder to GlbImage

    Inherited Members
    ValueType.Equals(object)
    ValueType.GetHashCode()
    ValueType.ToString()

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB.Scenes
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public struct SceneBuilderSchema2Settings
    Remarks

    Used by ToGltf2(SceneBuilderSchema2Settings)

    Properties

    Name Description
    CompactVertexWeights

    if meshes have Skin Weights, defines the output vertex element format:

    • True: Short
    • False: Float
    Default
    GpuMeshInstancingMinCount

    determines the mínimum number mesh instances required to enable Gpu mesh instancing.
    MergeBuffers

    Merges all the Buffer objects into a single big buffer.
    Default value is TRUE.
    UseStridedBuffers

    When true, meshes will be created using strided vertices when possible.
    WithGpuInstancing
